title: subject_split/v1 payload
description: Payload for identity-lifecycle split events. Emitted with envelope type=capture. Recorded when a coordinator archives a subject UUID and emits one or more successor identifiers (e.g., wrong-merge correction recovers the two conflated lineages atomically). Per ADR-002 §S7/§S8: the corrective-split case requires multiple successors emitted in a single event so neither lineage is lost; sequential single-successor splits would archive the source after the first emission.

successor_ids.description: The new subject UUIDs that take over for source_id. minItems: 1 per ship-2.md §6 commitment 4 (length-0 is rejected pre-validation per W-4). Wrong-merge correction emits 2 in a single event so both lineages survive.

reason.description: Optional explanation of the split decision.
